sections.title: CONTROL DEVICES FROM ANYWHERE IN THE WORLD
sections.text: turn on any electrical device with your smartphone; limits children’s access to the TV or console check if you turned off the iron when you go on vacation use the task calendar to automate many activities

sections.title: EASY-TO-USE APP
sections.text: By using the free wBox app, you can control devices in your home, garden, or business, both within range and from anywhere in the world, without additional devices – all you need is a home WiFi network.

sections.title: PROTECT YOURSELF
sections.text: Oven, curling iron, hair straightener, iron, faulty Christmas tree lights, and a Chinese phone charger. Any of these things can cause a fire, when you are not at home or when you sleep soundly. But you don’t have time to disconnect all these devices every day. SwitchBox does it for you, automatically at a set time or when you leave the house for a few minutes.

sections.title: EXTREMELY UNIVERSAL
sections.text: switchBox allows you to control not only the lighting but also practically any electrical device in your home or business, from the radiator and the iron, through the coffee machine and ending with the game console. Your child doesn’t want to study? One click and punishment for games, without leaving the sofa.

sections.title: EVERYWHERE YOU WANT
sections.text: Thanks to the miniature size and wireless communication, the switchBox can be hidden in almost any electrical device and independently controlled, to which plug it connects. On a hot day, do you take the windmill from the living room to the veranda? You can still turn it on the way you want, with your smartphone.

sections.title: CREATE ACTIONS AND REACTIONS
sections.text: The guests you are waiting for have just arrived? You can see them through the window, but did your remote control on the door get lost somewhere? Hold down the button that generally turns on the lighting in the dining room and your door will open. In this way switchBox allows you to configure many actions and reactions.

sections.title: SCHEDULE AND ASTRONOMICAL CLOCK
sections.text: A schedule with an astronomical clock function allows you to control at a given time and/or sunrise and sunset based on your geographical location. You can freely configure their behavior in the wBox application! If you don’t have the proper wiring, use the: “actionBox” “actionBoxS” “proxiBox” modules to create buttons without running wires! The controllers will send orders using the local WiFi network (without the Internet). uWIFI REMOTE CONTROL You can also pair to the “BleBox dacBoxD DC” WiFi controller: “uRemote” – rechargeable 4-CH remote control “sRemote” – battery 1-CH remote control “inBox” – battery-powered module for wall buttons The remote controls connect to the device directly via μWiFi (they do not require a WiFi network to operate). You can pair one remote control to many receivers, just as you can pair many remote controls to one receiver.

sections.title: VOICE CONTROL
sections.text: In combination with Google Home and Amazon Alexa voice assistants , you can control devices with your voice. Give a voice command to your smartphone, Google speaker or Alexa .

sections.title: RGB, RGBW, RGBCCT

sections.title: SMARTPHONE CONTROL
sections.text: Control your roller shutters remotely, from anywhere in the world, using your smartphone. The controller uses the existing WiFi network, you do not need an additional control panel or any radio bridge. Create scenes and groups that will allow you to control multiple blinds (shutterBox DIN controllers) at the same time. Close the blinds intelligently, e.g. give the command “close the blinds to 70%”, you do not have to stand and hold the button.

sections.title: FACADE BLINDS
sections.text: In addition to the usual external roller shutters , the “shutterBox DIN” can also control facade blinds with slats. The position of the roller shutter and slats can be set independently of each other. Decide how much light you let into your home.

sections.title: WINDOWS, AWNINGS, CURTAINS, SCREENS
sections.text: The controller can also control roof windows, projector screens, balcony or terrace awnings, and even electric curtains .

sections.title: SCHEDULE & ASTRONOMY CLOCK
sections.text: The schedule with the astronomical clock function enables control at a given time and at sunrise and sunset based on geographical location – roller blinds are always controlled at the same time of day, regardless of the season. When it gets dark, the blinds will automatically close so that you and the light in your room cannot be seen.

sections.title: WIRED AND WIFI BUTTONS
sections.text: You can connect 2 control buttons to the “shutterBox DIN”. It is also possible to create a wired central button. sections.text: Miniature dimensions allowing easy integration of the sensor Simple installation using the included double-sided tape or 2 screws Plug&Play – can be connected to a 5V charger (USB-A connector) Can be connected to a 12V or 24V DC power supply Can be used to create a weather station with other BleBox sensors Voice control and integrations:

sections.title: WIFI LIGHT SENSOR
sections.text: “BleBox luxSensor” is a WiFi sensor measuring light intensity in the range of 0 to 50,000 lx (lux) – the so-called luxmeter, photometer, solar sensor, light sensor, brightness sensor, light meter. The sensor communicates via a local WiFi network (it can work without Internet access) or directly (creating its own WiFi network). Thanks to the free BleBox cloud and the wBox application (available for smartphones and computers), remote communication from anywhere in the world is also possible.

sections.title: DETAILED DATA!
sections.text: The “BleBox luxSensor” offers a wide measurement range from 0 to 50,000 lx (lux) and a high resolution of 0.1 lx (lux) in the range of 0–10 lx (lux), which allows for precise determination of the brightness level. It can be used indoors to monitor whether the brightness of the lighting is appropriate for the activities performed or outdoors to assess atmospheric conditions and the current time of day. For example: – night, – twilight, – total cloudiness, – cloudy, – clear sky, – cloudless sky.

sections.title: LIGHTING CONTROL
sections.text: The “BleBox luxSensor” can be connected to other “BleBox” controllers to: automatically control lighting on/off (e.g. “switchBox” , “switchBox DIN” , “switchBox DC” ) automatically control the brightness of dimmable lighting (e.g. “dimmerBox” , “dacBoxD DC” , “ wLightBox” , “wLightBoxS” ) Examples of automation scenarios: Automatic control of lighting brightness in home or service premises (office, bar, restaurant, living room). Automatic control of lighting of house or greenhouse plants, taking into account current weather conditions. Automatic control of outdoor lighting, which, unlike an astronomical clock, takes into account current weather conditions affecting brightness. The device can wirelessly send up to 30 control commands to other BleBox devices via a local WiFi network (regardless of the Internet connection).

sections.title: SHADE CONTROL
sections.text: Connect the “BleBox luxSensor” to the “shutterBox” , “shutterBox DIN” lub “shutterBoxDC” , controller to automatically regulate the level of shading by adjusting the percentage of opening of blinds, roller blinds or awnings. For example: Automatic control of blind slats to limit the amount of light in the room (e.g. when watching TV or working on a computer). Automatic control of external blinds to limit heating of rooms from the sun. Automatic control of pergola slats, awnings or reflectors to disperse sharp sunlight. The device can wirelessly send up to 30 control commands to other BleBox devices via a local WiFi network (regardless of the Internet connection).

sections.title: CHARTS AND HISTORICAL DATA
sections.text: In the wBox application, you can view historical measurement values ​​on an interactive graph. The sensor provides two values ​​in the selected time window: average illuminance value, maximum illuminance value. This data helps determine whether the sky was cloudless or clear during a given time window. Historical data also helps track and determine how much light reached crops or photovoltaic panels. For advanced users, there is an option to export data to files in “.csv” or “.xlsx” (Excel) formats, which allows for further processing or archiving of information.

sections.title: NOTIFICATIONS, WARNINGS
sections.text: The “BleBox luxSensor” sunlight sensor can send push notifications to your smartphone. The notification can be sent as a warning after exceeding a certain brightness threshold or as a cyclical weather message. The content of the notification is fully configurable!

sections.title: WATERPROOF AND FUNCTIONAL HOUSING
sections.text: The housing of the “BleBox luxSensor” brightness sensor is weatherproof. The functional design allows for easy installation using one of two methods: the included double-sided mounting tape (adhesive), the included two mounting screws.

sections.title: PLUG & PLAY
sections.text: Installation is trivially simple! Connect to a charger with a 5V* input (USB-A, e.g. from a phone) and start working! Thanks to the power supply, you do not have to remember about the troublesome replacement of batteries and you can be sure that the sensor always works. — *For installers: it is also possible to cut the cable (cut off the USB-A connector) to power the sensor from a 5-24V DC power supply. This action does not void the warranty.

sections.title: WEATHER STATION
sections.text: The WiFi “luxSensor” will work great as an element of the WiFi weather station in combination with other BleBox sensors, including: temperature sensor ( “tempSensor PRO” ) humidity sensor ( “humiditySensor” ) rain sensor ( “rainSensor” ) wind sensor ( “windSensor PRO” ) air quality sensor ( “airSensor” ).

sections.title: FREE APP
sections.text: By using the free wBox app, you can control devices in your home, garden, or business, both within range and from anywhere in the world, without additional devices – all you need is a home WiFi network.

sections.title: CONTROL OF OTHER DEVICES

sections.title: NOTIFICATIONS
sections.text: Customize the way notifications are displayed according to your needs, for example by specifying whether they should appear on your screen periodically (for example, when it exceeds 25 ° C, notifications are sent every 10 minutes) or only once. Of course, the user is who determines the temperature threshold for a given notification (30 different actions can be configured). CHARTS In the application, select the type of graph showing changes in temperature values (bar, line, point) that is most effective for you. On this basis, you can take further actions that will help you, for example, reduce costs and your valuable time. That’s not all: apart from the chart preview, you can export data to a CSV file from the time period of your choice. Until a week ago, the data will be accurate every 5 minutes and averaged every hour through the year.

sections.text: Bluetooth RGBW LED lighting controller, which allows you to turn on multi- and mono-color LED lighting, dim, increase its brightness, and also set the desired color among a million possibilities. sections.text: Ready to be used immediately after turning on the power and installing the application. It does not require any configuration, however it can be controlled only within the range of the controller.

sections.title: HIDE IT WHERE YOU WANT
sections.text: LightBox uses radio waves instead of infrared communication, so the controller does not have to “see” the transmitter,that is a smartphone or tablet. Therefore, you can easily hide it wherever you want, on the kitchen cabinet, under the bed or on the tiles, and thus feel free to control the lighting.
